title: Persistent Worlds
body:
A simple mod where the only thing it does is disable the "Delete World" button.

Yes, I made this after accidentally deleting one of my worlds.

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
This mod may be used in any modpack.

Need a minecraft server? Consider Kinetic Hosting and get 15% off your first month with the code "APOTHICON" https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=146
